---
title: Why HTTP/3 Matters
author: TechThinker
date: 2024-02-25
description: QUIC-based HTTP/3 is reshaping how we think about web transport
tags: ["#http3", "#networking"]
---
QUIC-based HTTP/3 is reshaping how we think about web transport. The elimination of head-of-line blocking at the transport layer is a game changer.

**Key benefits:**
- Zero-RTT connection establishment
- Built-in encryption via TLS 1.3
- Multiplexed streams without TCP limitations
